.file-embed.background: rgb(42, 39, 63) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(57, 53, 82) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(35, 33, 54) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

a.external-link[data-tooltip-position=\".background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat-x scroll 0px 100% / 5px 5px padding-box border-box

a.internal-link.is-unresolved[data-href=.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat-x scroll 0px 100% / 5px 5px padding-box border-box

a.internal-link[data-href=\"callouts\"][.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat-x scroll 0px 100% / 5px 5px padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgb(49, 47, 68) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(9, 15, 35) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(9, 15, 35) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

code.background: rgb(49, 47, 68) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(35, 33, 54) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(49, 47, 68) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(49, 47, 68) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(35, 33, 54) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(49, 47, 68) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

hr.background: rgb(43, 39, 39) -webkit-linear-gradient(0deg, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0), rgb(246, 193, 119), rgb(235, 111, 146), rgb(234, 154, 151), rgb(197, 163, 255), rgb(156, 207, 216), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

hr.workspace-leaf-resize-handle.background: rgb(43, 39, 39) -webkit-linear-gradient(0deg, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0), rgb(246, 193, 119), rgb(235, 111, 146), rgb(234, 154, 151), rgb(197, 163, 255), rgb(156, 207, 216), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(42, 39, 63) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(49, 47, 68) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(49, 47, 68) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(49, 47, 68) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

strong.background: rgb(235, 111, 146) linear-gradient(62deg, rgb(235, 111, 146) 0%, rgb(196, 167, 231) 100%) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box text

th.background: rgb(49, 47, 68) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
